[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01100010 3
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 11000000 2
5 11000101 4
6 11100101 5
7 01100011 4

01 10 11100101 5 match 6
12 21 11110111 7
23 32 11111111 a
34 43 01101011 5
45 54 11011111 7
56 65 11111111 a
67 76 11110111 7
70 07 11100111 6

02 20 11110111 7
13 31 11101111 7
24 42 11110111 7
35 53 11111111 a
46 64 01110101 5
57 75 11111111 a
60 06 11110101 6
71 17 11100111 6

03 30 11101111 7
14 41 11100101 5 match 6
25 52 11111111 a
36 63 01111111 7
47 74 11100010 4
50 05 11011111 7
61 16 11110101 6
72 27 11110111 7

04 40 11000101 4 match 5
15 51 11111111 a
26 62 11110111 7
37 73 11101011 6
